title: Embed Graphs or Dashboards in website without monday.com branding
excerpt: As of now, users can only embed graphs in websites with the monday.com branding on the bottom right corner. Are there plans to change this? We also cannot use solutions like Softr or the client portal builder app to pull…

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml: As of now, users can only embed graphs in websites with the monday.com branding on the bottom right corner. Are there plans to change this? We also cannot use solutions like Softr or the client portal builder app to pull graphs and dashboards into our client portals.
